sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state after 5 SPACE presses
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print(f"Step={current_frame.step}, Level={current_frame.level}")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['pixels'] > 20:
        print(f"  id={n['id']} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} boundary={n['boundary']}")
# Check what the white block looks like now
w_blocks = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'W' and n['pixels'] >= 10]
for wb in w_blocks:
    print(f"White block: pixels={wb['pixels']} boundary={wb['boundary']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
